title: CVE-2026-47196: Quest Bot RCE
summary: [P2] Quest Bot is vulnerable to remote code execution due to improper input validation, with no patch available. This vulnerability is not actively exploited in the wild, but a proof-of-concept exists. Why now: Reported attribution (unverified): none (confidence: 0.80)
classification_reasoning: Quest Bot is a framework-level vulnerability that can lead to remote code execution.
